narration: Did you know your cells have tiny factories? They're called ribosomes!
visual_description: Hook visual: Did you know your cells have tiny factories? They're called ribosomes!
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Did you know your cells have tiny factories? They're called ribosomes!

narration: These molecular machines read RNA, the instructions for building proteins.
visual_description: Context visual: These molecular machines read RNA, the instructions for building proteins.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: These molecular machines read RNA, the instructions for building proteins.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: These molecular machines read RNA, the instructions for building proteins.

narration: They grab amino acids, the building blocks of life, and piece them together.
visual_description: Escalation visual: They grab amino acids, the building blocks of life, and piece them together.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: They grab amino acids, the building blocks of life, and piece them together.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: They grab amino acids, the building blocks of life, and piece them together.

narration: Each ribosome can create a protein in just minutes, crucial for cell function.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Each ribosome can create a protein in just minutes, crucial for cell function.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Each ribosome can create a protein in just minutes, crucial for cell function.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Each ribosome can create a protein in just minutes, crucial for cell function.

narration: Without ribosomes, our cells would be lifeless, unable to perform essential tasks.
